creator: lifanov@freebsd.org
text:
Can you install "portlint" and satisfy "portlint -A" please?
Also, can you add a "Created by:" line to the top like in other ports?

$ portlint -A
FATAL: /usr/home/lifanov/src/svn/freebsd/ports/head/www/apt-cacher-ng/pkg-plist: [50]: Unpacked man file acngfs.8 listed.  Must be gzipped.
FATAL: /usr/home/lifanov/src/svn/freebsd/ports/head/www/apt-cacher-ng/pkg-plist: [51]: Unpacked man file apt-cacher-ng.8 listed.  Must be gzipped.
WARN: Makefile: use of DISTFILES with single file discouraged. distribution filename should be set by DISTNAME and EXTRACT_SUFX.
WARN: Makefile: COMMENT should begin with a capital, and end without a period
WARN: Makefile: Consider defining LICENSE.
WARN: Makefile: DISTFILES/DISTNAME affects WRKSRC. take caution when changing them.
2 fatal errors and 4 warnings found.
